ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ethnic_groups" (
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic group */,
  "ethnic_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnic group */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Total population size of the ethnic group */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the ethnic group */,
  "primary_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the ethnic group */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for community leaders or health organizations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnic group of the case */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., active, recovered, hospitalized) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the case */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the case */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, region) where the case was reported */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* List of symptoms reported by the case */,
  "comorbidities" TEXT /* List of comorbidities or pre-existing conditions */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source from which the case was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_ethnic_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnic_group_id") REFERENCES ethnic_groups ("ethnic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case that was hospitalized */,
  "hospitalization_date" TEXT /* Date the case was hospitalized */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date the case was discharged */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital where the case was hospitalized */,
  "ward" TEXT /* Ward or department in the hospital */,
  "duration_of_stay" INTEGER /* Number of days the case was hospitalized */,
  "reason_for_hospitalization" TEXT /* Reason for hospitalization (e.g., severe symptoms, complications) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the hospitalization (e.g., discharged, transferred, deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case that was vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the case was vaccinated */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Number of the dose (e.g., 1, 2, booster) */,
  "dose_series" TEXT /* Name of the dose series (e.g., primary series, booster series) */,
  "vaccination_site" TEXT /* Location where the vaccination was administered */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* List of side effects reported after vaccination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_group_cases" (
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnic group */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the ethnic group */,
  "percentage_of_all_cases" REAL /* Percentage of all cases that belong to the ethnic group */,
  "total_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations in the ethnic group */,
  "percentage_of_all_hospitalized" REAL /* Percentage of all hospitalizations that belong to the ethnic group */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of cases within the ethnic group */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of cases within the ethnic group */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of cases within the ethnic group */,
  "case_trends" TEXT /* Trends in case numbers over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_group_vaccinations" (
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnic group */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations in the ethnic group */,
  "percentage_of_all_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of all vaccinations that belong to the ethnic group */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of vaccinated individuals within the ethnic group */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of vaccinated individuals within the ethnic group */,
  "vaccination_trends" TEXT /* Trends in vaccination numbers over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, healthcare provider) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_group_data" (
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnic group */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the ethnic group */,
  "total_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations in the ethnic group */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of cases within the ethnic group from the data source */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of cases within the ethnic group from the data source */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of cases within the ethnic group from the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_group_id", "data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of vaccinated individuals within the ethnic group from the data source */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of vaccinated individuals within the ethnic group from the data source */,
  "vaccination_trends" TEXT /* Trends in vaccination numbers over time from the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id", "data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_vaccination_link" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case */,
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "vaccination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_hospitalization_link" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case */,
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "hospitalization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_vaccination_link" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospitalization */,
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id", "vaccination_id")
)
